subject: WS1.4 claim closed while parked
body: Fiery follow-up: I closed claim 10bef384 after parking WS1.4 because there are no active graph-core/package/lockfile repo edits left under my ownership. This should reduce false overlap for Verdant/Dim. Parked files remain at /private/tmp/fiery-ws1.4-parked/; when you clear the dependency path I can reopen a fresh WS1.4 claim, reapply those files, add jsonld/@types coordination-safe, and run graph-core gates.
